title: Weird and powerful weapons
description: Some strange and powerful weapons add to Minecraft
body:
# Weird and powerful weapons

**Today Weird and powerful weapons have just 1 item but I want to add more items**

To give you an item do 
```
/function totem/give/<the item>
```
 To have the custom textures you can download this [RESSOURCES PACK](https://modrinth.com/project/1p4AiChX)

## Totem of protection

Add a new Totem of undying that explose when the player hold his right-click

![A player when he use the Totem of protection](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0199e9d680f2902e2724adb1b9c761d8efa9e34f_0.webp)

------------------------------------------------------------------

Totem of protection have a loading time before he start to Explose

![The animation on the loading time](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/812e596e6a4d0d3b84ee90c48301069636e2ca1f_0.webp)

## Config menu

To config the datapack do
```
/function totem:config_book
```
![The config book of the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c5ed78f2b2f086aff925e73b64d904b8243f4c8.png)
